full_text:
Yuan Yao 袁燿
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yuan Yao (袁燿)was born in Runan. Son of Yuan Shu. Fled south to Liu Xun, later to Sun Ce. Yuan Yao was affiliated with Yuan Shu and the Wu Kingdom.
